api_key.description: Miro REST API v2 access token. Sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Miro API base URL override for tests or proxies.

board_id.description: Miro board id that board-scoped streams (board_users, board_items, board_tags, board_connectors) read from. Required for those streams.
